sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Array(UInt32), score Float64 DEFAULT 0);
SELECT id, bitmapBuild(values) AS bm, (values -> x -> x * 2) AS doubled_values FROM test_table;
SELECT id, bitmapBuild([score, IFNULL(score, 0)]) AS bm_score FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING bm_score != bitmapBuild([]);
SELECT id, values, bitmapBuild(arrayMap(x -> x * 3, values)) AS tripled_bitmap FROM test_table WHERE length(values) > 0;
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(values) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS flat_values SELECT bitmapBuild(flat_values) AS flat_bitmap;
SELECT id, count() AS cnt FROM test_table WHERE bitmapBuild(values) != bitmapBuild([]) GROUP BY id HAVING cnt > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, values, (values -> x -> x + 1) AS incremented FROM test_table WHERE score = 0; DROP TABLE temp_table;
SELECT id, bitmapBuild(values) AS bm, (SELECT sum(arrayJoin(values)) FROM test_table WHERE id < 3) AS total_sum FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, bitmapBuild([1, 2, NULL]) AS bm_with_nulls FROM test_table WHERE bitmapBuild([length(values)] + toUInt32(NULL)) IS NOT NULL;
